store_headline: WordPress Theme for Rock Bands and Metal Artists
store_subheadline: Build your band site with discography, tour dates, videos, and a merch store.
features: Built with WPBakery Page Builder ($99 value) included
Event listing and tour date functionality
Video gallery with custom player options
Portfolio custom post type with advanced filtering
Wolf WPBakery Extension with music-specific elements
Content Blocks system for custom headers and footers
One-click demo import with complete content
Mobile-optimized responsive design for all devices
Multiple blog layout options (grid, masonry, metro)
Social sharing integration across multiple platforms
selling_points: Dripped/distressed metal typography — the most genre-specific type treatment in the WordPress music theme catalog
Black-and-white concert crowd photography that communicates live energy before any content loads
The only theme that treats visual aggression as a design value, not a liability
Built specifically for rock and metal bands — not adapted from a generic music theme
Complete music features: discography, tour dates, video gallery, and WooCommerce merch store
Darker and heavier than Bronze, more genre-specific than Loud — doesn't try to serve everyone
WPBakery and Slider Revolution for custom pages that carry the same attitude as the music
The band site that sounds like it looks before a single track plays
key_benefits: Build a band site as heavy and uncompromising as the music
Attract metal fans who recognize the aesthetic and trust the band immediately
Showcase discography and videos in a visual identity indie themes can't fake
Sell merch directly through WooCommerce built for genre-specific stores
Launch a band presence that doesn't compromise — no generic layouts
Convert show-goers into merch buyers with wishlist and quickview built in
Own the rock/metal visual space Bronze, Loud, and Beatit deliberately leave unclaimed
design_features: Dark color schemes with high contrast elements
Rock and metal typography and design elements
Custom music player with playlist support
Distressed textures and gritty visual elements

testimonials.text: Great theme highly customizable, and great and quick support! I'm really satisfied!
testimonials.author: helenaisred

testimonials.text: I am very satisfied with the theme and the support is fast and effective
testimonials.author: mirko_sk8

testimonials.text: Great support, highly recommended, thanks so much!!!
testimonials.author: byronnemeth
